description_long: This is a rectangular, two-compartment cabinet or shelf unit with a vibrant purple finish. The structure is open at the front, revealing two cubby spaces, one of which contains several vinyl records or flat objects stored vertically. The top surface supports a tan, boxy speaker and a small stack of books or magazines, along with a vinyl record partially protruding. The back and sides are solid, with no visible openings or handles, and the overall design is simple and modern. The materials appear to be primarily wood or engineered wood, painted purple, with the speaker likely made of wood and fabric. The object is suitable for use in urban environments such as living rooms, music shops, or community spaces.
description: A purple, two-compartment open shelf with a speaker and records on top, and vinyl records stored inside. Modern, simple, and functional for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open cubbies, records stored vertically, and a speaker and books on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the unit, the speaker, and items on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid purple back and the speaker and items on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mainly showing the speaker and the top surface items.
